articles.headline: OpenAI to acquire Astral
articles.description: OpenAI announced its acquisition of Astral, expanding its capabilities in the AI space.

articles.headline: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
articles.description: OpenAI released new smaller, more efficient models in the GPT-5.4 family.

articles.headline: Creating with Sora safely
articles.description: OpenAI published safety guidelines and updates for its Sora video generation platform.

articles.headline: Anthropic designated as supply chain risk by Department of War
articles.description: Anthropic received a letter designating them as a supply chain risk to national security; the company plans to challenge this in court.

articles.headline: Anthropic introduces Automated Alignment Agent (A3) for Safety Finetuning
articles.description: A new agentic framework that automatically mitigates safety failures in LLMs with minimal human intervention.

articles.headline: Claude discovers 22 Firefox vulnerabilities
articles.description: In collaboration with Mozilla, Claude Opus 4.6 discovered 22 Firefox vulnerabilities over two weeks.

articles.headline: Why Wall Street wasn't won over by Nvidia's big conference
articles.description: Despite investor fears of an AI bubble, Nvidia's latest conference shows most in the industry aren't concerned.

articles.headline: Google expands personalized Gemini AI to all US users
articles.description: Google is rolling out its Personal Intelligence feature to all US users, allowing Gemini to draw on data from connected apps.

articles.headline: White House releases national AI policy framework
articles.description: The Trump administration released a national AI policy framework urging Congress to adopt a federally unified, innovation-oriented regime.

articles.headline: Apple hires Google's Lilian Rincon as VP of AI product marketing
articles.description: Apple hired Lilian Rincon from Google to lead product marketing for artificial intelligence.
